epic: Deliver a planning preview panel backed by a stable plan contract.
recommended_plan: Lock the plan contract first, then build the plan UI.

tasks.title: Lock planning contract
tasks.description: Define the backend planning contract that downstream UI work depends on.
acceptance_criteria: The planning contract shape is explicit and stable for downstream consumers.
Implementation notes identify the backend contract surface.

quality_gate.gate_reason: Contract changes must pass tests and review before downstream work starts.

tasks.title: Build planning UI flow
tasks.description: Build the frontend planning UI against the locked backend contract.
acceptance_criteria: The UI reads from the contract produced by task-plan-contract.
Implementation notes identify the frontend change surface.

quality_gate.gate_reason: UI changes must pass tests and review before integration handoff.

notes_for_orchestrator: Direct planning stayed on implementation tasks only.
risks: UI delivery depends on the contract staying stable after the backend task.
